actionCalls.name: Commit_Update_OpportunityLineItems_And_Account_Details
actionCalls.label: Commit Update OpportunityLineItems And Account Details

value.stringValue: Address validation Failed, returning to starting screen
No shipping required, address not validated
Lab Order already has scheduled callout. Just updating the Lab order for now
User selected to continue with address not validated successfully
Default Outcome encountered, back to Reship/Reorder

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Setting_Is_Kit_Registered_to_False
actionCalls.label: Log - Error Setting Is Kit Registered to False

value.stringValue: Error Setting Is Kit Registered to False

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_in_API_Call_Update_Create
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault in API Call Update/Create

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Posting_To_Chatter_Demographics
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault Posting To Chatter Demographics

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Updating_Opportunity_Line_Items
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault Updating Opportunity Line Items

value.stringValue: Error Updating the Opportunity Line Items

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Updating_Opportunity_Line_Items_Update_Button
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault Updating Opportunity Line Items - Update Button

value.stringValue: Error Updating the Opportunity Line Items

actionCalls.name: Log_I_Will_Update_the_Address
actionCalls.label: Log - I Will Update the Address

value.stringValue: User selected to correct the address manually
Is Kit Registered Set to TRUE
Is Kit Registered Set to FALSE

actionCalls.name: Log_PGT_Product_with_Kit_Registered
actionCalls.label: Log - PGT Product with Kit Registered

value.stringValue: PGT Product with Kit Registered, resetting the Is Kit Registered field to trigger warehouse update automation
User selected to proceed with the suggested address
Lab Order update failed, not found. Going to submit new lab order to lab
Default Outcome encountered, back to Reship/Reorder

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Failed_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address Failed - Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_I_Will_Update_the_Address
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - I Will Update the Address

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Passed_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - Passed - Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Use_Suggested_Address
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - Use Suggested Address

actionCalls.name: Log_Validate_Address_Use_the_Address_Provided
actionCalls.label: Log - Validate Address - Use the Address Provided

actionCalls.description: This is temporary and will be replaced with something more permanent, but for now we are going to store all of the demographic details in a chatter post on the Lab Order for the time being.
actionCalls.name: PTC_OpportunityLineItemDetails
actionCalls.label: PTC - OpportunityLineItemDetails

assignments.name: Assign_Lab_Order_count
assignments.label: Assign Lab Order count

assignments.name: Assign_Lab_Provider
assignments.label: Assign Lab Provider

assignments.name: Assign_Updated_Lab_Order_Record_to_Original_Lab_Order_Record
assignments.label: Assign Updated Lab Order Record to Original Lab Order Record

assignments.description: We do this to allow the Is Kit Registered automation to fire properly as that automation is based on when those fields get filled in.
assignments.name: Clear_Demographic_Data_from_Opportunity_Line_Item
assignments.label: Clear Demographic Data from Opportunity Line Item

assignments.name: Clear_Kit_Id_on_Opportunity
assignments.label: Clear Kit Id on Opportunity

assignments.name: Opportunity_Suggested_Addresses
assignments.label: Opportunity Suggested Addresses

assignments.name: Opportunity_Suggested_Addresses1
assignments.label: Opportunity Suggested Addresses

assignments.name: Set_Account_Demographic_Details
assignments.label: Set Account Demographic Details

assignments.name: Set_API_Status_Submit_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set API Status - Submit Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_API_Status_Update_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set API Status - Update Lab Order

assignments.description: We set the count to 1 as we use this count to determine future steps, like the In-Person Kit Update action.
assignments.name: Set_Count_of_Lab_Orders_to_1
assignments.label: Set Count of Lab Orders to 1

assignments.name: Set_Current_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Current Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_Current_Lab_Order_From_Data_Table
assignments.label: Set Current Lab Order - From Data Table

assignments.name: Set_Current_Lab_Order_Via_Loop
assignments.label: Set Current Lab Order - Via Loop

assignments.name: Set_Error_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Error - Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_API_Fault
assignments.label: Set Error Message - API Fault

assignments.name: Set_Height_and_Weight_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Height and Weight - Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_Is_Kit_Registered_as_ture
assignments.label: Set Is Kit Registered as ture

assignments.name: Set_Kit_Id_and_Lab_Provider_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Kit Id and Lab Provider - Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_Kit_Id_and_Lab_Provider_Opportunity
assignments.label: Set Kit Id and Lab Provider - Opportunity

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Stage_and_Status
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Stage and Status

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Status_InPerson
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Status - InPerson

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Status_Virtual
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Status - Virtual

assignments.description: Since we are overriding we need to bypass all checks in the "Get Valid Lab Provider" subflow.
assignments.name: Set_Override_Flag_for_Lab_Provider_Check
assignments.label: Set Override Flag for Lab Provider Check

assignments.name: Set_Patient_Demographic_Data_on_Line_Item
assignments.label: Set Patient Demographic Data on Line Item

assignments.name: Set_Region_Override_Status
assignments.label: Set Region Override Status

assignments.name: Set_Rejection_Notes
assignments.label: Set Rejection Notes

assignments.name: Set_ReOrder_Status_and_Status_Reason
assignments.label: Set ReOrder Status and Status Reason

assignments.name: Set_Reship_Status_and_Status_Reason
assignments.label: Set Reship Status and Status Reason

assignments.name: Set_Shipping_Information_Opportunity
assignments.label: Set Shipping Information - Opportunity

assignments.name: Set_Shipping_Information_Opportunity_Region_Override_Non_Validated
assignments.label: Set Shipping Information - Opportunity - Region Override - Non Validated

assignments.name: Set_Shipping_Information_Opportunity_Validate_Address
assignments.label: Set Shipping Information - Opportunity - Validate Address

assignments.name: Set_Shipping_Information_Opportunity_Validate_Address1
assignments.label: Set Shipping Information - Opportunity - Validate Address

assignments.name: Set_stage_to_approved
assignments.label: Set stage to approved

assignments.description: This will ensure that the Get Opportunity Id `Get Records` element works.
assignments.name: Set_the_recordId_to_the_Opportunity_Id
assignments.label: Set the recordId to the Opportunity Id

assignments.name: Set_Updated_Account_Item
assignments.label: Set Updated Account Item

assignments.name: Set_Updated_Opportunity_Line_Item
assignments.label: Set Updated Opportunity Line Item

value.stringValue: The Body Mass Index (BMI) value for this patient is over range. Please review the entered data to ensure accuracy.
The Body Mass Index (BMI) value for this patient is under range. Please review the entered data to ensure accuracy.

decisions.description: If we have a lab order then we can update the lab order via the update API, if now we need to set back to Approved to initiate the automation to generate create the lab order and submit to the lab.
decisions.name: Are_There_Open_Lab_Orders
decisions.label: Are There Open Lab Orders

rules.name: Is_it_an_In_Person_update_with_a_Lab_Order_Present
rules.label: Is it an In-Person update with a Lab Order Present

rules.name: I_will_update_the_addresses_manually

rightValue.stringValue: I will update the address manually
I will update the address manually

rules.label: I will update the addresses manually

decisions.description: Here if we are udating the oorderwe don't need to clear anything
decisions.name: Button_Pressed_Update_Order
decisions.label: Button Pressed Update Order?

rules.name: I_will_update_the_address_manually

rightValue.stringValue: I will update the address manually
I will update the address manually

rules.label: I will update the address manually

decisions.name: Check_Count_of_Open_Lab_Orders
decisions.label: Check Count of Open Lab Orders

rules.name: No_of_open_Lab_Order_is_1
rules.label: No. of open Lab Order is 1

rules.name: Number_of_Open_Lab_Order_is_Greater_then_1
rules.label: Number of Open Lab Order is Greater then 1

rules.name: No_Lab_Orders_But_Assigning_Kit_Id_Lab_Provider
rules.label: No Lab Orders, But Assigning Kit Id/Lab Provider

decisions.description: If we got a 404 not found then we need to do a submit instead of an update.
decisions.name: Did_We_Get_a_404_Not_found_Error
decisions.label: Did We Get a 404 Not found Error

decisions.name: Do_We_Need_to_Update_Opportunity_Line_Items
decisions.label: Do We Need to Update Opportunity Line Items
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Don't Update The Opportunity Line Items

decisions.description: Depending on the checkbox on the screen element if we skip the address validation check or not from SF.
decisions.name: Do_We_Skip_Address_Validation_Check
decisions.label: Do We Skip Address Validation Check

decisions.description: If the lab supports update order we will send that otherwise we will send a submit order as that is how they are wired to get updates.
decisions.name: Does_Lab_Support_Update_Order
decisions.label: Does Lab Support Update Order

decisions.description: We want to show the users buttons instead of the form to provide more user guidance on the form.
decisions.name: Does_this_need_to_load_In_Person_Kit_Update
decisions.label: Does this need to load In-Person Kit Update

decisions.description: We have a function that will go through all of the line items to compile a collection of requested items that needs to be sent to the lab. Here we check if that was successful or not.
decisions.name: Gather_Requested_Items_Successful
decisions.label: Gather Requested Items Successful

decisions.description: Check if the provided address on the update screen is correct
decisions.name: Is_Address_Correct
decisions.label: Is Address Correct

decisions.description: Check if shipping on the Lab Order is required. If not, skip the address validation
decisions.name: Is_Address_Validation_Required
decisions.label: Is Address Validation Required

decisions.description: Check if order contains a PGT product with Kit registered field as true. In this case, we remove the Kit Registered flag and then put it back to trigger Record Trigger - Lab Order - Kit Registered - Send update to warehouse flow that updates the warehouse
decisions.name: Is_it_PGT_with_Kit_Registered
decisions.label: Is it PGT with Kit Registered

decisions.description: If the Kit is registered we need to save off the details
decisions.name: Is_Kit_Registered
decisions.label: Is Kit Registered

decisions.description: If Yes, return the Opp to Approved
decisions.name: Is_Opportunity_in_Needs_More_Information_Stage
decisions.label: Is Opportunity in Needs More Information Stage

decisions.name: Is_there_a_Kit_Id_on_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: Is there a Kit Id on the Opportunity
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Kit Id on the Opportunity

decisions.name: Is_There_A_Lab_Order_Button_Pressed
decisions.label: Is There A Lab Order - Button Pressed

decisions.description: Checks if there is a lab order or not, can't log against a lab order if there is none.
decisions.name: Is_There_A_Lab_Order_Fault_Log
decisions.label: Is There A Lab Order - Fault - Log

decisions.name: Is_There_A_Lab_Order_Passed
decisions.label: Is There A Lab Order - Passed

decisions.description: We do not always have a lab order to update due to an issue when trying to create the Lab Order. Here this check will ensure we have a lab order and if we don't will set the opportunity to a stage where the Lab Order can be created.
decisions.name: Is_There_A_Lab_Order_To_Update
decisions.label: Is There A Lab Order To Update

decisions.description: Check if there is a scheduled callout set in Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab field (Supplements and Books). If it already has scheduled callout, do not make a callout now
decisions.name: Is_there_a_scheduled_callout_to_the_Lab
decisions.label: Is there a scheduled callout to the Lab

decisions.name: Was_API_Call_Successful_Update_Lab_Order_Request
decisions.label: Was API Call Successful - Update Lab Order Request

rules.name: Successful_API_Call_Update_Lab_Order_Request
rules.label: Successful API Call - Update Lab Order Request

Flow.description: Allows an Opportunity or a Lab Order to be Reshipped, Reordered, Region Override, or allow In-Person Kit Update

formulas.description: Check if address validation for Region Override returned No Suggestion
formulas.name: bool_isNoSuggestionRegionOverride
formulas.expression: OR( {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedState} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry} = "No Suggestion" )

formulas.description: Check if address validation for Update Order returned No Suggestion
formulas.name: bool_isNoSuggestionUpdate
formulas.expression: OR( {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedState} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry} = "No Suggestion" )

formulas.name: form_numMinorGirlsBMI
formulas.expression: CASE({!form_numPatientAge}, 17, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 36, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 17, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 16, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 35, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 17, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 15, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 34, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 17, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 14, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 32, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 17, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 13, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 31, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 16, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 12, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 30, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 15, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 11, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 29, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 15, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 10, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 27, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 9, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 26, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 13, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 8, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 25, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 13, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 7, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 24, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 13, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 6, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 23, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 13, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 5, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 22, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 4, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 22, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 3, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 22, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 2, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 23, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 'Age Out of Range' )

formulas.description: Calculate BMI based on the entered height and weight.
formulas.name: form_numPatientBMI
form_txtPatientBMIStatus
formulas.expression:
IF( {!form_numPatientAge} < 18, /* For Minors */ IF( {!Patient_Gender.selectedChoiceValues} = 'male', CASE({!form_numPatientAge}, 17, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 34, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 18, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 16, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 32, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 17, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 15, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 31, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 16, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 14, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 30, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 16, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 13, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 29, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 15, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 12, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 29, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 15, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 11, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 27, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 10, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 26, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 9, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 25, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 8, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 23, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 7, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 22, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 6, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 22, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 5, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 21, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 4, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 21, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 14, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 3, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 22, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 15, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 2, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} > 23, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF({!form_numPatientBMI} < 15, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '')), 'Age Out of Range' ), /* Female Minor */ {!form_numMinorGirlsBMI} ), /* For Adults */ IF( {!form_numPatientBMI} > 40, {!const_txtBMIAboveMessage}, IF( {!form_numPatientBMI} < 18.5, {!const_txtBMIBelowMessage}, '' ) )
)

Flow.interviewLabel: Screenflow - Reship/Reorder/Region Override/In-Person Kit Update - Lab Order - Opportunity {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Screenflow - Reship/Reorder/Region Override/In-Person Kit Update - Lab Order - Opportunity

recordLookups.description: OpportunityLineItem update causing Is Kit registered flag set to false because transaction is not commiting and again we are updating Lab order which in turn update the Line items
recordLookups.name: Get_Updated_Lab_Order_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Updated Lab Order Record

recordUpdates.description: This update is mainly for the address to be saved before the lab order is created
recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_Address
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity - Address

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_Line_Items_Update_Button
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity Line Items - Update Button

fields.name: Validation_failed_message
fields.fieldText:
﻿{!$Label.Style_Header_Red}

Address Validation Error


The address provided could not be validated.

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Use Suggested Address","value":"Use Suggested Address","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Continue Anyway","value":"Continue","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1},{"label":"Enter new address manually","value":"I will update the address manually","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":2}]

[{"label":"Continue Anyway","value":"Continue","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Enter new address manually","value":"I will update the address manually","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1}]

fields.name: Copy_1_of_disclaimer_message
fields.fieldText:
Disclaimer:

The suggested address has been provided based on Google Address Validation. Please verify that all parts of the address are correct before proceeding.

The suggested address may not always reflect accurate or up-to-date information for your intended purpose. By proceeding, you acknowledge and accept any potential discrepancies with the suggested address.



**Suggested Address**

Street: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet}

City: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity}

State: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedState}

Postal Code: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode}

Country: {!Validate_Address_Action.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry

fields.name: disclaimer_message
fields.fieldText:
Disclaimer:

The suggested address has been provided based on Google Address Validation. Please verify that all parts of the address are correct before proceeding.

The suggested address may not always reflect accurate or up-to-date information for your intended purpose. By proceeding, you acknowledge and accept any potential discrepancies with the suggested address.



**Suggested Address**

Street: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet}

City: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity}

State: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedState}

Postal Code: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode}

Country: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry}

screens.name: Error_in_API_Call_Update_Lab_Order_Request
screens.label: Error in API Call - Update Lab Order Request

fields.name: txt_APICallError_UpdateLabOrderRequest
fields.fieldText:
Woops, looks like we ran into an error trying to update the lab order:


Error Message:

{!Submit_Lab_Order_Request.results.errorMessage}

{!Update_Lab_Order_Request.results.errorMessage}

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: txt_ErrorGatherRequestedItems
fields.fieldText:
Woops, we ran into an issue while gathering the required items.


Error Message:

{!Create_Collection_of_Requested_Items.txt_ErrorMessage}﻿

fields.name: txt_FlowFaultMessage
fields.fieldText:
Woops, ran into the following error:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Proceed_On_Lab_Order_Msg
fields.fieldText: This Opportunity already has a Lab Order Created. Any Kit updates need to be done on the Lab Order record itself

screens.name: Reship_Reorder_Region_Override_In_Person_Kit_Update
screens.label: Reship / Reorder / Region Override / In-Person Kit Update

fields.name: txt_InPerson_ButRequiresShipping
fields.fieldText: The product on this opportunity requires shipping thus the Kit Id and Lab Provider can not be changed. Change the product to a non-shipping product to set the Kit Id and Lab Provider

fields.name: txt_ErrorDateOfBirth
fields.fieldText: Date of Birth is 01/01/1920 please change the date of birth.

fields.name: Skip_Patient_Demographic_Check
fields.fieldText: Skip Patient Demographic Check (Only Works for Update Order)

fields.name: txt_ShippingHeader
fields.fieldText: Please ensure the shipping information is correct below and then finish the submission request.

fields.name: txtErrorBothCheckboxChecked
fields.fieldText: Please only check either "Use Account Billing Address" or "Use Account Shipping Address"

fields.name: InvalidShippingAddress
fields.fieldText: There was an error validating this address: {!Validate_Address_Action.errorMessage} {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Skip_Address_Validation_Check
fields.helpText: If this box is checked, the Lab Order automation will skip address validation. The distribution company may still reject this Order due to an invalid shipping address.

fields.name: Invalid_Lab_Provider
fields.fieldText: Invalid Lab Provider, please select another one and try again.

fields.name: BMI_details_below
fields.fieldText: Please Confirm the Patient Details Below

fields.name: Display_Error
fields.fieldText:
﻿{!$Label.Style_Header_Red}

Address Validation Error


The address provided could not be validated.

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Use Suggested Address","value":"Use Suggested Address","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Continue Anyway","value":"Continue","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1},{"label":"Enter new address manually","value":"I will update the address manually","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":2}]

[{"label":"Continue Anyway","value":"Continue","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Enter new address manually","value":"I will update the address manually","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1}]

textTemplates.name: txt_ApproverNotification
txt_OpportunityLineItem_DemographicDetails
txt_ReshipNotificationMessage
